info.name: Open EMS — ENTSO-E DAM
info.description:
Test Open EMS `/api/dam/entsoe/*` routes and the ENTSO-E Transparency REST API (DocumentType A44, ProcessType A01).

**OREE DAM chart (Spain + Poland overlay):** use **GET chart-day-zones** with `zones=ES,PL` — same call as the Open EMS UI (`DamChartPanel.jsx` → `/api/dam/entsoe/chart-day-zones?date=…&zones=ES,PL`).

**Single zone:** **GET chart-day** with `zone=ES` or `zone=PL` (aliases from `ENTSOE_ZONE_ALIASES`).

**Setup:** copy `postman_environment` values — set `entsoeToken` to your portal token; adjust `baseUrl` if the API runs on another host/port.

**Manual sync:** `POST /sync` and `POST /sync-zone` return 403 unless `ENTSOE_DAM_MANUAL_SYNC_ENABLED=1` on the server.

**Direct Transparency:** `periodStart` / `periodEnd` are `YYYYMMDDHHmm` in **UTC** (delivery local midnight → next local midnight). Values differ for **ES** (`Europe/Madrid`) vs **PL** (`Europe/Warsaw`) — set `zoneEic` / `zoneEicPL` and matching period bounds.

request.description: Lists configured bidding zones (aliases, EIC, timezone) and whether `ENTSOE_SECURITY_TOKEN` is set on the server.

query.description: Delivery day (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to Brussels today if omitted.

request.description: Hourly DAM from DB; may lazy-fetch from ENTSO-E if empty (`ENTSOE_CHART_DAY_LAZY_FETCH`). Response includes `lazySyncTriggered`. Set collection variable `zoneAlias` to **PL** for Poland only.

query.description: Comma-separated aliases, same as UI overlay: ES,PL

request.description: Batch endpoint used by the **Ukraine (OREE)** DAM chart for ES/PL EUR overlay lines. Response shape: `zones.ES`, `zones.PL` with `hourlyPriceDamEurMwh` / `hourlyPriceDamEurPerKwh` each; `lazySyncTriggeredByZone` per alias. See `GET /api/dam/entsoe/chart-day-zones` in `app/routers/entsoe_dam.py`.
Same manual gate as POST /sync. Single zone.

Same query shape as `fetch_entsoe_day_ahead_points` (no `curveType`). Default `zoneEic` = `10YES-REE------0`. Set `periodStart` / `periodEnd` for the delivery window in UTC (Spain: `Europe/Madrid` local midnight → UTC).
Poland bidding zone EIC `10YPL-AREA-----S`. Use `periodStartPL` / `periodEndPL` for the delivery day in UTC (`Europe/Warsaw` midnight boundaries differ from ES).
